Web Directory "Masterlist"

Table of Contents
  • Clarification and Disclaimers
  • Active Directories
  • Inactive Directories
  • Directories on Hiatus
  • Directories of Unknown Status

Please do not use this as a comprehensive list! If you want a complete, comprehensive list of all active webrings/directories, please use brisray.com's Webring List and Indie Web Directories, respectively. Those lists are also updated frequently and give more details than this one.

This is my attempt to catalogue as many webrings and web directories as I can. There are other lists out there, but most of them were non-comprehensive, out of date, etc. I hope this page can be a helpful resource for finding cool sites and communities!

This page currently lists 266 different directories!

Clarification and Disclaimers

  • All of the directories listed here focus on small, personal, and/or independent sites/blogs. No corporate sites, no site builders (squarespace, carrd, etc), and no social media accounts.

  • I've excluded directories that are centered around bigotry, illegal content, blatant misinformation, etc. I've also decided not to link to directories focused on explicit content since my site is SFW. If any of the sites mentioned fall under that and it just went over my head, please let me know so I can remove them.

  • That being said, I do not like or agree with every directory linked here. This page is supposed to be a comprehensive list, not a list of my favorites.

  • Keep in mind that some of these directories are more actively maintained than others. Maintaining a directory may include stuff like accepting new members, removing dead/broken sites, fixing technical problems, and enforcing any rules they have set up.

  • Directories marked as "general" are directories without any specific theme. They are/were open to any and all personal websites.

Active Directories

Webrings/directories/etc that are currently accepting new members and are being actively maintained by their ringmasters.

Name Theme
*nixRing Users of Linux and Unix-like operating systems
//web General
1MB Club Websites under 1 megabyte
250KB Club Websites under 250 kilobytes
512KB Club Websites under 512 kilobytes
A11y-Webring.Club Practitioners of digital accessibility
AberWebRing Students and alumni of Aberystwyth University
Acing The Internet Asexuals
Ad-Lib Club Fans of the 1960s.
ADHMe People with ADHD
AKIRA Club Akira fans
Aliens Online People who identify as/with aliens
Alterhuman Assembly Alterhumans (otherkins, therians, etc.)
Alterhuman Terrace Alterhumans (otherkins, therians, etc.)
Animatronics Fans Webring Animatronic enthusiasts
Apartment Webring General, with an art and Tomodachi Life theme
Aperture Webring Portal fans
Artists Making the Internet Gay Again LGBT+ artists
Artists Online Visual artists of all kinds
ASCIIring ASCII art fans
Astronomy Webring People interested in astronomy/astrophysics/etc.
AutisTBH People with autism
Beepbox Webring Webmasters who make music with beepbox
Bill's PC Pokémon fans
Bisexualism Webring Bisexuals
Bolognese Ring General
Bonki Webring General
Book Ring Websites related to books and writting
Brasileiros no Neocities Brazilians on Neocities
Bucket Webring Hand-coded websites
Bukmark.Club Websites with links directories
Bulltown.Sidecar General
Burger Ring Fast food lovers (with art/RP elements)
Café Rosé Cute/kawaii websites run by adults
Car Seat Headrest Webring Car Seat Headrest fans
Care Bears Webring Care Bears fans
Catfolk Webring Feline furries, therians, etc.
Catppuccin Webring Sites that use the Catppuccin color scheme
CDRing Music enthusiasts
Chatbots Webring AI character card creators
Citizens of Verdite Fromsoftware fans
Claw Webring General(?)
Code Collective Indie websites that offer coding resources/help/tips/tutorials
CODEC RING Metal Gear fans
Collectors Webring People who collect things
CookieRun Webring Cookie Run fans
CoolAndGood General
CornRing People who live in the Midwestern USA
CSS JOY Webring People who like messing around with CSS
Cutie Club J-fashion enthusiasts
CYBER WORLD Deltarune/Undertale fans
CYBERTRON WEBRING Transformers fans
Darktheme Club Websites with dark layouts

Deftring Deftones fans
DeltaRing Deltarune/Undertale fans
Doodlering People who like to doodle
Dr. Pepper Ring Dr. Pepper fans
Dragonverse Dragon enthusiasts
Eggring Egg enthusiasts

Epic WebRing Static websites

EvRing Evanescence fans
Fan Editors Webring People who make fan edits
Fancy Fursona Webring Furries(?)
Fandom Ring Anyone in fandom
Fanfiction Webring Fanfiction writers
Fansites Webring Fansites
Fediring Fediverse users
FemRing Feminine/GNC men
Femtanyl Webring Femtanyl fans
FINAL GIRLS WEBRING Final Girls and fans of Final Girls
FlipnoteRing Webring Flipnote Hatena/Sudomemo users
Focus First Webring Websites that minimize distractions
Foodring Food-themed websites
Francophonering French speakers
Free Country USA Homestar Runner fans
Frutiger Aero Webring Fans of the frutiger aero aesthetic
FujoRing Out Fans of Yuri and/or Yaoi
Funky Webring Heavily styled websites
Furnix Webring Furries who use Linux/UNIX
Furry Dev Webring Furries who are also game developers
Furryring Members of the furry fandom
FURzine WEBring Furry zinesters
Galactic Webring Space enthusiasts
Game Devs Together Game developers (video games and tabletop!)
Gamer Ring Gamers and fans of video games
Geekring Self-identified geeks
Generation Lissa Webring People who learned HTML/CSS between 1996-2005
GFDKWTFAW Webring "GOD FUCKING damnit KRIS where the FUCK are we!?"
Ghostring Horror/witchy themed sites
Glass Beach Webring Glass Beach fans
Glitter Webring Websites with colorful layouts
Goth Music Ring Fans of goth music
Green Day Webring Green Day fans
Gummyring Candy enthusiasts
Hack Club Webring Hack Club members
Hazbin Webring Hazbin Hotel fansites and shrines
Hollow Ring Hollow Knight/Silksong fans
Homebrew Webring People who enjoy homebrewing/modding their devices
Homering Homepages
Homestuck Webring Homestuck fans
Homestuckies Homestuck fans
Hotline Webring General
HTML Energy Webring General(?)
HTML Hobbyist Webring People who make and teach others how to make hand-coded, HTML websites
Hyperfixated Webring Neurodivergent people with hyperfixations
JournalRing People who like to journal
K-Pop Webring K-pop fans
Kemono Ring Kemonomimi
KNIFEBEETLE long-form, narrative-driven webcomics
Lambda Webring Half-Life fans
Leaky Homepage Ring Websites that have sprung a leak
LesbieRing Lesbians

Linux Webring Linux users
Little Planet Webring Sonic the Hedgehog fans
Little Planet Webring Sonic the Hedgehog fans
Loop Ring General
LPS Webring Littlest Pet Shop fans
Magic Ring Fiber artists (people who knit/crochet/etc.)

Monitor Ring Vocaloids fans

Netizen Club Webring Websites that are viewable on older computers
Netloop General
No AI Webring People against generative AI/LLMs
No CSS Club Websites without CSS or JavaScript

Nora Webring People named Nora, Eleonora, Leonora, etc.
Nuclear Nerd Nexus Nerds with niche interests
Null Webring Websites hosted on Neocities
NYAN Webring Nyan Cat fans
OC Webring People with original characters (avalible in both English and Chinese)
OCverse People with original characters or self-inserts
Off-Platform Webring Sites run by adults that aren't hosted by the main webhosting platforms (Neocities/Nekoweb/etc.)
Omoring General(?), with an Omari theme
Online Webring Active sites that update at least once a month
OtakuRing Self-identified otakus
Our Favorite Void General
Papernet Zinesters
Peach Ring Websites with food-related content
Persona Webring Persona fans
PersonaRing People with personas, avatars, etc.
PikRing Pikmin fans
Pillowfort Webring Pillowfort users

QTPOC Webring Queer and Trans People of Color

WEB/COMIC/RING Webcomics

Webring Webring Webring hosts

Inactive Directories

Webrings/directories/etc that are no longer accepting new members and receive no/limited maintenance, or webrings/directories/etc haven't been updated in a long time and are seemingly abandoned. However, the member lists are still up and those sites may still be active.

Name Theme
Accessible Net Directory Accessible websites
Animal Crossing Webring Animal Crossing fans
Apartment Webring Tomodachi Life fans
Cuddler Webring People who love cuddling
Cute Gallery Artists who draw cute stuff
Endless Orbit Webring "Old web"-style websites
Galleryring Websites with art galleries
Low Tech Webring Directory Low tech enthusiasts
Magicalhearted Webring Fans of magical girl media
Misc-Webring General
NewWeb Webring General
OpenBooks WebRing Static websites
Our Space General
PokéRing Pokémon fans
Self-Insert Webring Self-shippers with self-inserts
Vampire Club Vampire enthusiasts
WiiRing Wii/Wii U fans

Directories on Hiatus

Webrings/directories/etc that are reportedly on hiatus, but not abandoned. These directories are still being actively maintained, have been updated recently, or have a set end date for their hiatus.

Name Theme
Autists Online Indie websites with autistic webmasters
From Country, With Love People of differant nationalities
Melanated People of Color
Yumering Yume Nikki fans

Directories of Unknown Status

Webrings/directories/etc where it's not clear if they're still active or not.

Name Theme
Ladies of the Links Women
